contents.primaryText: Appian Community Support Specialist Email Inbox

value.requiredMessage: At least one item must be selected
value.instructions: Configure views to display information about a record

contents.label: Default Views
contents.helpTooltip: News and Related Actions view show by default on each record.

contents.docPlaceholderMessage: Place cursor on function, rule, or constant to display help

contents.label: Record Title
contents.instructions: The title that appears at the top of each record view, in record tags, and in record cards.

contents.label: Record Header Position
choices: Fix the record header to the top of the page when scrolling

#v.description: A document is any file that a user has stored on the system.  Typically this value will be provided from a Process Variable.
Null represents a lack of value.
